items.title: Imagine a piece of software so powerful it completely disables the operations of tech com…
items.title_zh: 想象一下一款如此强大的软件，它可以完全禁用科技公司的运营……
items.description: Imagine a piece of software so powerful it completely disables the operations of tech companies, freezing progress and rendering them worthless. Such damaging capabilities must be controlled and stopped. Import restrictions on Jira. Now.
items.description_zh: 想象一下，一款功能如此强大的软件会完全瘫痪科技公司的运营，冻结进展并使它们变得毫无价值。必须控制和制止这种破坏能力。 Jira 的进口限制。现在。

items.description: The layer that can route to the best AI model for the particular job is going to increase in value substantially. There are at least 3 big reasons: * Cost optimization: there are plenty of use cases where you need frontier intelligence for…

items.title: Everyone thinks this is some kind of 4D chess or conspiracy.
items.title_zh: 大家都认为这是某种4D棋或者阴谋。
items.description: Everyone thinks this is some kind of 4D chess or conspiracy. But it’s quite standard to try and jailbreak AI models, and by definition they would share that research with the government given that’s whole point. I don’t think Amazon assume…
items.description_zh: 大家都认为这是某种4D棋或者阴谋。但尝试越狱人工智能模型是相当标准的，而且根据定义，他们会与政府分享这项研究，因为这就是重点。我不认为亚马逊认为……

items.title: This whole Fable export control situation is actually net positive to regulation discours…
items.title_zh: 整个《寓言》的出口管制情况实际上对监管言论是积极的……
items.description: This whole Fable export control situation is actually net positive to regulation discourse. It’s an early peek into what AI regulation would end up looking like at scale when enacted at the model layer instead of the specific application o…
items.description_zh: 这整个寓言出口管制形势实际上对监管话语是积极的。这是对人工智能监管在模型层而不是特定应用程序中制定时最终会是什么样子的初步了解。

items.title: In AI most people are still trying to use old maps on a new territory.
items.title_zh: 在人工智能领域，大多数人仍在尝试在新领域使用旧地图。
items.description: In AI most people are still trying to use old maps on a new territory. Throw the maps away. It's time to draw new ones. The only way you can do it is walking the land.
items.description_zh: 在人工智能领域，大多数人仍在尝试在新领域使用旧地图。把地图扔掉。是时候画新的了。你能做到的唯一方法就是在土地上行走。

items.title: I wish the significance of the model came from more people actually using it and coming t…
items.title_zh: 我希望这个模型的重要性来自于更多的人实际使用它并来到......
items.description: I wish the significance of the model came from more people actually using it and coming to their own conclusions But yes most people in the world learn about it through signifiers and not through interacting with that which is signified ht…
items.description_zh: 我希望这个模型的意义来自于更多的人实际使用它并得出自己的结论，但是，是的，世界上大多数人都是通过能指来了解它的，而不是通过与所指事物的互动来了解它……
